title: The Straw Hats Accept the Risk
description: On pages 17–18, the straw hats accept the risk as vivi, Igaram, and the Straw Hats try to survive Baroque Works’ pursuit while the truth about Alabasta comes into focus.
scene: The Straw Hats Accept the Risk. Vivi, Igaram, and the Straw Hats try to survive Baroque Works’ pursuit while the truth about Alabasta comes into focus. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: Damn, that's one dangerous booger alright...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Mr. swordsman...! Seeing your impressive strength, please allow me to make an unreasonable request!

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Let go of me! I ain't gonna help you just because you suck up to me!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Those two are "ability users" and it is beyond my power to stop them!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Please! Please protect the princess in my stead!

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: If you successfully send her safely back to Alabasta, a kingdom located in the Far East...

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: I swear you shall be rewarded greatly...!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I beg of you, sir! Please protect the Princess!

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: I'll kill you if you don't shut up.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: How about a billion bell then?

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on the straw hats accept the risk. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
